title: tanacetum persicum
intro: Tanacetum persicum, also known as the Pyrethrum or Persian Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to repel insects and relieve pain, due to the presence of pyrethrin, a potent bioactive compound. The health benefits of Tanacetum persicum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful for treating fever, headaches, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum persicum can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate a range of symptoms and support overall well-being.
